Rows: CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN T2.label = '+' THEN T2.molecule_id ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(DISTINCT T2.molecule_id)

gt_sql: SELECT CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN T2.label = '+' THEN T2.molecule_id ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(DISTINCT T2.molecule_id) FROM atom AS T1 INNER JOIN molecule AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id INNER JOIN bond AS T3 ON T2.molecule_id = T3.molecule_id WHERE T3.bond_type = '#'
pred_sql: SELECT CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN T2.label = '+' THEN T2.molecule_id ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(DISTINCT T2.molecule_id) AS percentage FROM bond AS T1 JOIN molecule AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T1.bond_type = '#'
question: What is the percentage of carcinogenic molecules in triple type bonds?
